basic_details.job_title: IARI Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI) Recruitment 2026: Indian Agricultural Research Institute has released the official notification for 1 Project Associate-I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 years (3 years relaxation for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST/Women)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST/Women candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Plant Physiology/Botany/ Biotechnology/ Plant Science/ Life Science or equivalent qualification required
qualification.details: Project Associate-I: Masters in Plant Physiology/Botany/ Biotechnology/ Plant Science/ Life Science or equivalent qualification required. Research experience in field work is desirable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IARI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IARI Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Project Associate-I position at IARI is May 30, 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Plant Physiology, Botany, Biotechnology, Plant Science, Life Science, or an equivalent qualification to be eligible for the Project Associate-I role.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is age relaxation for reserved categories. Candidates belonging to OBC category get a relaxation of 3 years, while SC/ST and women candidates receive a relaxation of 5 years from the maximum age limit.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate-I post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 31,000 per month, along with an additional 24% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate-I position at IARI will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for the interview based on their applications.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with all required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Associate-I in the Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI) recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is research experience mandatory for this post?
faq.answer: While a Master's degree is mandatory, research experience in field work is considered desirable for the Project Associate-I position. It can enhance your application.

faq.question: Q9. What documents need to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to submit your bio-data as per Annexure 1, along with attested copies of your educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), ID proof, and a recent passport-size photograph.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
